Features of TreeView:
- Hierarchical structure: Allows nesting of nodes to represent complex data relationships.
- Expand/Collapse: Users can expand or collapse nodes to view or hide child nodes.
- Selection: Users can select nodes to perform actions.
- Customization: Nodes can have icons, labels, and tooltips
